There are twelve kinds of sounding mechanism in Orthoptera, Hemiptera, Coleoptera, Homoptera, Diptera et al.
They include 14 species of Coleoptera, 6 of Orthoptera, 2 of Hemiptera, 7 of Homoptera, 2 of Diptera and 9 of Lepisoprera.
